name: 命令1
python_code:
import time
import pyautogui
import pyperclip
import os
import numpy as np
import cv2

print("="*50)
print("【走到模块】开始执行")
print("="*50)

project_dir = r"E:\5-ZDZS-TXA5"
primary_pic_dir = os.path.join(project_dir, '3MCWB', 'workgroups', '2')
secondary_pic_dir = os.path.join(project_dir, '3MCWB', 'pic')

def find_pic_dir(image_name):
    primary_path = os.path.join(primary_pic_dir, image_name)
    if os.path.exists(primary_path):
        return primary_pic_dir
    secondary_path = os.path.join(secondary_pic_dir, image_name)
    if os.path.exists(secondary_path):
        return secondary_pic_dir
    return None

def find_and_click(image_name, wait_time=1):
    pic_dir = find_pic_dir(image_name)
    if not pic_dir:
        print(f"图片不存在: {image_name}")
        return False
    image_path = os.path.join(pic_dir, image_name)
    print(f"查找图片: {image_name}")
    screenshot = pyautogui.screenshot()
    screen_np = np.array(screenshot)
    screen_cv2 = cv2.cvtColor(screen_np, cv2.COLOR_RGB2BGR)
    template = cv2.imread(image_path)
    if template is None:
        print(f"无法读取图片: {image_name}")
        return False
    result = cv2.matchTemplate(screen_cv2, template, cv2.TM_CCOEFF_NORMED)
    min_val, max_val, min_loc, max_loc = cv2.minMaxLoc(result)
    if max_val >= 0.8:
        h, w = template.shape[:2]
        center_x = max_loc[0] + w // 2
        center_y = max_loc[1] + h // 2
        print(f"找到图片 {image_name}，坐标: ({center_x}, {center_y})")
        pyautogui.click(center_x, center_y)
        if wait_time > 0:
            time.sleep(wait_time)
        return True
    else:
        print(f"未找到图片 {image_name}，相似度: {max_val:.3f}")
        return False

max_loops = 3
loop_count = 0

while loop_count < max_loops:
    loop_count += 1
    print(f"\n=== 第{loop_count}次循环 ===")

    found_st = find_and_click("1-ST.png", wait_time=0)
    found_fd = find_and_click("1-FD.png", wait_time=0) if not found_st else False
    found_hc = find_and_click("1-HC.png", wait_time=0) if not found_st and not found_fd else False

    if found_st or found_fd or found_hc:
        print("=== 找到目标图片，执行操作序列 ===")

        for i in range(6):
            print(f"点击坐标36,522 (第{i+1}次)")
            pyautogui.click(36, 522)
            time.sleep(1)

        print("点击坐标955,715")
        pyautogui.click(955, 715)
        time.sleep(1)

        print("按BACKSPACE键")
        pyautogui.press("backspace")
        time.sleep(1)

        print("使用pynput.keyboard输入参数")
        print(f"coord_params = {coord_params}")
        from pynput.keyboard import Controller
        kb = Controller()
        kb.type(coord_params)
        time.sleep(1)

        print("点击坐标1240,708")
        pyautogui.click(1240, 708)
        time.sleep(1)

        print("点击坐标1158,718")
        pyautogui.click(1158, 718)
        time.sleep(2)

        print("点击坐标666,386")
        pyautogui.click(666, 386)
        time.sleep(1)

        print("查找1-DD.png")
        find_and_click("1-DD.png", wait_time=1)
        time.sleep(1)

        print("点击坐标933,711")
        pyautogui.click(933,711)
        time.sleep(1)

        print("查找1-CZ.png")
        find_and_click("1-CZ.png", wait_time=1)
        time.sleep(1)

        print("再次查找1-CZ.png")
        find_and_click("1-CZ.png", wait_time=1)
        time.sleep(2)

        print("完成主流程，退出循环")
        break

    else:
        print("=== 未找到目标图片，执行备用操作 ===")

        print("点击坐标67,700")
        pyautogui.click(67, 700)
        time.sleep(2)

        print("查找1-TC.png")
        tc_found = find_and_click("1-TC.png", wait_time=4)

        print("再次查找1-TC.png")
        find_and_click("1-TC.png", wait_time=1)
        time.sleep(1)

        print("查找1-CC.png")
        cc_found = find_and_click("1-CC.png", wait_time=4)

        if not (tc_found or cc_found):
            print("未找到任何关键图片，退出循环")
            break

print("="*50)
print("【调动模块】执行完成")
print("="*50)

        from pynput.keyboard import Controller
